[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 110000111 5
2 110111100 6
3 000101110 4
4 011010000 3
5 101011101 6
6 100000010 2
7 110101000 4

01 10 010010001 3
12 21 111101011 7
23 32 001111000 4

67 76 001100110 4
70 07 000100111 4

13 31 110010011 5
24 42 001000011 3
35 53 100101100 4
46 64 101111000 5
57 75 000001001 2
60 06 001000001 2
71 17 010110110 5

03 30 100000010 2 match 6
14 41 110101000 4 match 7
25 52 101010100 4
36 63 101000011 4
47 74 100011110 5
50 05 000101110 4 match 3
61 16 011010000 3 match 4
72 27 101011101 6 match 5

04 40 100111001 5

37 73 100100101 4
